Title: Cold-Pressed Coconut Oil - Extra Virgin & Full Wooden Extraction 1L
Description:
This bottle of Videeptha Foods Cold Pressed Coconut oil to retain valuable nutrients and flavor that you will not find in refined oil, making it good for your heart and your overall well being. It is 100% chemical free, unrefined, unbleached and pure. Interestingly, this oil has lauric acid (which only found in human breast milk) that fights against harmful pathogens and makes the body strong.
What's unique about Videeptha Foods Cold-Pressed Oils?
We always use high-quality raw materials to extract oils. Most importantly, the machines used are entirely made of wood i.e., both Ulakkai (upper rod) and Ural (bottom cylinder) made out of country wood. No stone or stainless parts are used. This ensures the temperature of the oil doesn't exceed 50 degree celsius, keeping the oil truly "wooden cold-pressed" while retaining all essential nutrients and flavor are retained. Moreover, the suspended particles are removed by real sedimentation i.e., let the oil sit under the sun for about 4 days allowing the suspended particles to settle down at the bottom and manually collect the oil from the top. That's the reason we cannot produce this oil in large quantities and also for the translucent look rather than being transparent.

Title: Black Kuruvai Rice (Karung Kuruvai Arisi)
Description:
At Videeptha Foods, we are proud to offer Black Kuruvai Rice (Karung Kuruvai Arisi), an ancient rice variety known for its health benefits and rich nutritional content. Grown traditionally, this rice is a powerhouse of antioxidants, dietary fiber, and essential nutrients, making it an excellent choice for those who prioritize wellness and a balanced diet.
The deep, dark color of Black Kuruvai Rice comes from its high anthocyanin content, which provides strong antioxidant properties that help protect the body from oxidative stress. This rice variety is also rich in fiber, supporting digestive health, and is known to have anti-inflammatory benefits, making it a fantastic addition to a beneficial lifestyle.
Superb for various dishes like rice bowls, porridge, or even time-honored South Indian meals, Karung Kuruvai Arisi offers a distinct flavor and texture that enhances the nutritional value of your meals. Whether you're aiming to boost your immunity or simply enjoy a wholesome, unprocessed grain, Black Kuruvai Rice is an ideal option.
Key Benefits of Black Kuruvai Rice (Karung Kuruvai Arisi):
High in antioxidants, particularly anthocyanins
Promotes digestive health with high fiber content
Helps boost immunity and overall well-being
Choose Videeptha Foods's Black Kuruvai Rice for a naturally nutritious and flavorful addition to your meals. Embrace the conventional goodness and experience the health benefits of this superfood today!
Ingredients:
Black Kuruvai Rice
Suggested Recipe - Black Kuruvai Rice Dosa
Wash & soak 2 cups black kuruvai rice for 12 hours
Grind with 1 cup chopped coconut to make coarse batter
Transfer batter to a bowl
Add salt and little oil and mix well
Make dosa in a tawa with this batter

Title: Forest Elephant Rice (Kaattu Yaanam Arisi)
Description:
At Videeptha Foods, we offer you the unique and nutrient-dense Forest Elephant Rice (Kaattu Yaanam Arisi), a authentic rice variety known for its exceptional health benefits. This rice is grown in select regions, prized for its rich nutrient profile, making it a staple for those who seek both taste and nutrition in their meals.
Forest Elephant Rice is naturally high in dietary fiber, vitamins, and essential minerals.  Ideal for a wide range of dishes, from steamed rice to biryani and everything in between, Kaattu Yaanam Arisi is a versatile ingredient that supports a balanced diet.
This variety of rice is not only about flavor and nutrition; it also supports sustainable and eco-friendly farming methods. By choosing Videeptha Foods’s Forest Elephant Rice, you're ensuring a meal that's wholesome and supports authentic agricultural practices.
Key Benefits of Forest Elephant Rice:
Rich in dietary fiber and essential nutrients
Supports digestive health and boosts energy levels
Grown using eco-friendly, sustainable farming methods
Ideal for a variety of nutritious meals
Experience the rich, earthy taste of Videeptha Foods’s Forest Elephant Rice and enjoy the health benefits it brings to your family’s table.
Ingredients:
Kaattu Yaanam Rice
Suggested Recipe - Kaattu Yaanam Rice Idly/Dosa
Soak 2 cups kaattu yaanam rice and 2 cups idly rice for 6 hours
Separately soak 1 cup urad dal and 3 tbsp fenugreek seeds
Grind all ingredients in a grinder and add salt as required
Transfer to a bowl and let it ferment for about 8 hours
Make dosa in a tawa or idly with this batter

Title: Black Rice (Karuppu Kavuni Arisi)
Description:
Black rice, also known as Karuppu Kavuni Arisi in Tamil, is an ancient grain celebrated for its numerous health benefits and striking dark purple-black color. This nutrient-dense rice is packed with antioxidants, particularly anthocyanins, which give it its unique hue and help protect the body from oxidative stress.
Traditionally consumed by royalty in ancient times, black rice has earned the nickname "forbidden rice" due to its rarity and high value. Today, it is prized for its rich nutritional profile, including high fiber content, protein, and essential vitamins and minerals like iron and vitamin E. It is also gluten-free, making it a superb choice for those with gluten sensitivities.
Health Benefits of Black Rice (
Karuppu Kavuni Arisi
):
Rich in Antioxidants
: The anthocyanins in black rice have powerful anti-inflammatory properties.
Supports Heart Health
: It helps lower cholesterol levels and improve heart function.
Aids Digestion
: The high fiber content promotes a health-promoting digestive system.
Helps in Weight Management
: Low in calories and high in nutrition, black rice can support weight management goals.
Whether used in savory dishes, desserts, or as a side, Kavuni Arisi is a versatile ingredient that adds not just flavor but a wealth of health benefits to your meals. Enjoy it in porridges, biryanis, or even as a nutritious alternative to white rice.
Experience the goodness of Black Rice and elevate your health with every bite!
Ingredients:
Kavuni Arisi
Suggested Recipe - Black Rice Idly/Dosa
Mix 2 cups black rice, 3/4 cup urad dal, 2 cup idly rice and handful of rice flakes (poha)
Soak the mixed ingredients for 6 hours
Grind well in a grinder and add salt as required
Transfer to a bowl and let it ferment for about 8 hours
Make dosa or idly with this batter

Packed with nutrients, including iron, vitamins, and fiber, this rice supports digestion, enhances immunity, and promotes energy. Its unique red hue and slightly coarse texture make it ideal for making classic South Indian dishes like Pongal, Idli, and Dosai.
Embrace the power of tradition and choose Maapillai Samba Rice for a healthier, more energetic lifestyle. Add it to your daily diet and enjoy its earthy flavor and numerous health benefits.

Improves immunity naturally
Shop now at Videeptha Foods for 100% organic Maapillai Samba Rice and rediscover the health secrets of ancient grains.

Maapillai Samba Rice.
Suggested Recipe - Maapillai Samba Payasam (Phirni)
